ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the device (e.g., Android, iOS) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company affiliation of the device */,
  "device_udid" TEXT /* Unique device ID (UDID) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the device's operating system */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Last date the device synced data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "bundle_id" TEXT /* Bundle ID of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application developer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the application version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the application version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_applications" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the application was installed on the device */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Last date the application was used on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Time the log was generated */,
  "computer_id" TEXT /* ID of the computer */,
  "app_status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the company was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, end-user) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-device relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-device relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_applications" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-application relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-application relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mdm_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Time the log was generated */,
  "computer_id" TEXT /* ID of the computer */,
  "app_status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mdm_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mdm_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rest_api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Time the log was generated */,
  "computer_id" TEXT /* ID of the computer */,
  "app_status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rest_api_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rest_api_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the developer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the developer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role-permission relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role-permission relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
